CVE-2019-15547.title: An issue was discovered in the ncurses crate through 5.99.0 for R ...
CVE-2019-15547.summary: An issue was discovered in the ncurses crate through 5.99.0 for Rust. There are format string issues in printw functions because C format arguments are mishandled.

CVE-2019-15548.title: An issue was discovered in the ncurses crate through 5.99.0 for R ...
CVE-2019-15548.summary: An issue was discovered in the ncurses crate through 5.99.0 for Rust. There are instr and mvwinstr buffer overflows because interaction with C functions is mishandled.
